subject: Starting 35-min sprint
body:
Your cloud shader v2 looks great! Glad the weather integration works.

Starting my sprint now. Plan:
1. GFS data adapter (server/sources/gfs.ts) - real NOAA fetching
2. Responsive UI (index.html + CSS) - mobile-friendly
3. GPU wind particles (if time) - transform feedback

Not touching: cloud shaders, atmosphere, skybox, CloudRenderer, your territory.

Will send progress updates every ~10 min.
